# HYDRA

> Autonomous regulatory + market intelligence API with 66+ paid endpoints. Live crypto prices, DeFi yields, stablecoin pegs, multi-chain gas, Fear & Greed, forex. Real-time data from 18+ sources. Market-calibrated Fed rate probabilities. Alpha signals with edge analysis. From $0.001 USDC on Base L2.

HYDRA is the infrastructure layer of the x402 economy. It provides live market data (CoinGecko crypto prices, DeFi Llama TVL/yields/stablecoins, Fear & Greed Index, multi-chain gas from public RPCs, ECB forex rates), real-time economic data from 18+ authoritative sources (FRED, BLS, Treasury, SEC EDGAR, Federal Register, FDIC BankFind, Congress.gov, Fed RSS, Kalshi KXFED, Polymarket, CoinGecko, DeFi Llama, Alternative.me, ECB), composite intelligence products (alpha signals with Kelly sizing, market-calibrated risk scores, regulatory pulse), prediction market signals with Kalshi KXFED-calibrated Fed rate probabilities (60% market / 40% model blend), FOMC decision classification within 30 seconds, push alerts, web extraction, format conversion, developer tools, and oracle data for UMA/Chainlink.

## Payment

All paid endpoints use the x402 HTTP payment protocol. Send USDC on Base (chain 8453) to wallet `0x2F12A73e1e08F3BCE12212005cCaBE2ACEf87141`. Include the transaction hash in the `X-Payment-Proof` header, or use a standard x402 client that handles payment automatically.

## Endpoints

### Free (no payment required)
- `GET /health` — Service health and automaton status
- `GET /pricing` — Full pricing table for all endpoints
- `GET /v1/markets` — Active regulatory prediction markets on Polymarket and Kalshi
- `GET /v1/util` — Utility service discovery listing
- `GET /v1/x402/directory` — Canonical x402 ecosystem directory (all known x402 services, updated hourly)
- `GET /v1/x402/stats` — x402 ecosystem aggregate statistics
- `GET /v1/alerts/status` — Check alert subscription status
- `GET /docs` — Interactive OpenAPI documentation
- `GET /openapi.json` — Machine-readable OpenAPI spec

### x402 Ecosystem Hub ($0.001 - $0.005 USDC)
- `GET /v1/x402/status?url=...` ($0.005) — Real-time health and capability check of any x402 service.
- `POST /v1/x402/route?capability=...` ($0.001) — Intelligent routing to the best x402 service for your need.

### Composite Intelligence ($0.25 - $5.00 USDC)
- `GET /v1/intelligence/pulse` ($0.50) — Hourly regulatory pulse with composite risk signal from all US agencies.
- `GET /v1/intelligence/alpha` ($5.00) — Premium composite alpha: regulatory + Fed + prediction markets + momentum.
- `GET /v1/intelligence/risk-score?token=BTC` ($2.00) — Real-time 0-100 regulatory risk score for any token or protocol.
- `GET /v1/intelligence/digest` ($1.00) — Daily regulatory + market digest for compliance teams and trading agents.
- `GET /v1/intelligence/economic-snapshot` ($0.50) — Atomic real-time snapshot: FRED (28 series), BLS, Treasury yields, FDIC, Federal Register.
- `GET /v1/intelligence/regulatory-pulse-live` ($0.50) — Live regulatory pulse: SEC EDGAR search, Federal Register API, Congress bill tracker.
- `GET /v1/intelligence/bank-failures` ($0.25) — FDIC bank failure monitor: recent closures, resolution details, estimated losses.

### Push Alerts ($0.05 - $0.10 USDC)
- `POST /v1/alerts/subscribe` ($0.10) — Register webhook for push alerts. $0.10 buys 100 alert deliveries.
- `GET /v1/alerts/feed` ($0.05) — Poll-based regulatory alert feed (last 24 hours).

### Extraction Tier ($0.01 - $0.05 USDC)
- `POST /v1/extract/url` ($0.01) — Structured web extraction: title, headings, clean text, links, OpenGraph metadata.
- `POST /v1/extract/multi` ($0.05) — Batch extraction from up to 5 URLs in parallel.
- `GET /v1/extract/search?q=...` ($0.02) — Web search with structured result extraction: titles, snippets, URLs.

### Web Checks Tier ($0.003 - $0.005 USDC)
- `GET /v1/check/url?url=...` ($0.005) — URL health check: status code, response time, redirect chain, content type.
- `GET /v1/check/dns?domain=...` ($0.005) — DNS record lookup: A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME via DNS-over-HTTPS.
- `GET /v1/check/ssl?domain=...` ($0.005) — SSL certificate inspection: issuer, expiry, SANs, days remaining.
- `GET /v1/check/headers?url=...` ($0.003) — HTTP response headers with security headers analysis and score.

### Conversion Tier ($0.003 - $0.005 USDC)
- `POST /v1/convert/html2md` ($0.005) — HTML to Markdown. Preserves headings, lists, links, code blocks, tables.
- `POST /v1/convert/json2csv` ($0.003) — JSON array of objects to CSV with auto-detected headers.
- `POST /v1/convert/csv2json` ($0.003) — CSV text to JSON array. First row = headers.

### Developer Tools Tier ($0.001 - $0.003 USDC)
- `POST /v1/tools/hash` ($0.001) — Hash text with SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5, SHA-1, SHA3-256.
- `POST /v1/tools/encode` ($0.001) — Base64, URL, hex encode/decode.
- `POST /v1/tools/diff` ($0.003) — Unified diff between two texts with change stats and similarity ratio.
- `POST /v1/tools/validate/json` ($0.001) — JSON syntax validation with pretty-print and structure info.
- `POST /v1/tools/validate/email` ($0.002) — Email format validation with MX record check.

### Public Data Tier ($0.01 - $0.02 USDC)
- `GET /v1/data/wikipedia?q=...` ($0.01) — Wikipedia article summary: extract, thumbnail, description, page URL.
- `GET /v1/data/arxiv?q=...` ($0.02) — arXiv academic paper search: titles, authors, abstracts, PDF links.
- `GET /v1/data/edgar?q=...` ($0.02) — SEC EDGAR filing search: 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K by company, ticker, or keyword.

### Live Market Data Tier ($0.001 - $0.05 USDC)
- `GET /v1/market/prices?ids=bitcoin,ethereum,solana` ($0.001) — Live crypto prices, market caps, 24h change via CoinGecko. Up to 20 coins.
- `GET /v1/market/global` ($0.001) — Global crypto market: total market cap, BTC/ETH dominance, 24h volume.
- `GET /v1/market/trending` ($0.001) — Top trending cryptocurrencies (most searched last 24h).
- `GET /v1/market/fear-greed` ($0.001) — Crypto Fear & Greed Index: 0-100 score with 7-day history.
- `GET /v1/market/gas` ($0.001) — Live gas prices across Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon. 15s cache.
- `GET /v1/market/stablecoins` ($0.002) — Top 20 stablecoins with circulating supply and peg deviation tracking.
- `GET /v1/market/defi/tvl` ($0.002) — Top 25 DeFi protocols by TVL with 1d/7d change via DeFi Llama.
- `GET /v1/market/defi/yields?min_tvl=1000000` ($0.005) — Top DeFi yield opportunities: APY, TVL, IL risk, stablecoin flag.
- `GET /v1/market/defi/chains` ($0.001) — Top 30 blockchains ranked by total DeFi TVL.
- `GET /v1/market/forex` ($0.001) — Major forex rates from the European Central Bank (~30 pairs).
- `GET /v1/market/snapshot` ($0.05) — Complete market snapshot: crypto prices, global, fear/greed, gas, stablecoins.

### Binance CEX Data ($0.002 - $0.005 USDC)
- `GET /v1/market/binance/prices?symbols=BTCUSDT,ETHUSDT` ($0.002) — Real-time Binance prices with 24h volume, high/low, trades, bid/ask.
- `GET /v1/market/binance/orderbook?symbol=BTCUSDT&limit=20` ($0.005) — Binance order book: bids, asks, and spread.
- `GET /v1/market/binance/klines?symbol=BTCUSDT&interval=1h&limit=24` ($0.005) — Binance OHLCV candlestick data for charting.

### DEX Data ($0.005 - $0.01 USDC)
- `GET /v1/market/dex/token?address=0x...` ($0.01) — All DEX pairs for a token across all chains via DexScreener.
- `GET /v1/market/dex/search?q=uniswap` ($0.005) — Search DEX pairs by token name, symbol, or address.

### Bitcoin Network ($0.002 USDC)
- `GET /v1/market/bitcoin/fees` ($0.002) — Bitcoin recommended fees, mempool stats, hashrate, difficulty.
- `GET /v1/market/bitcoin/lightning` ($0.002) — Lightning Network: nodes, channels, capacity, fee rates.

### Treasury Auctions ($0.005 USDC)
- `GET /v1/market/treasury/auctions?security_type=Note&limit=10` ($0.005) — U.S. Treasury auction results: yield, bid-to-cover. Tier 1 government.

### Agent Utility Tier ($0.001 - $0.01 USDC)
- `POST /v1/util/scrape` ($0.005) — URL to clean structured text. HTML parsed, scripts removed.
- `GET /v1/util/crypto/price?token=ETH` ($0.001) — Token price, 24h change, market cap, volume. Cached 30s.
- `POST /v1/util/rss` ($0.002) — RSS/Atom feed URL to structured JSON entries.
- `GET /v1/util/crypto/balance?address=0x...` ($0.001) — ETH and USDC balance on Base L2.
- `GET /v1/util/gas` ($0.001) — Base L2 gas prices with cost estimates for transfers, swaps, mints. Cached per block.
- `GET /v1/util/tx?tx_hash=0x...` ($0.001) — Transaction receipt lookup — status, gas used, block number.
- `POST /v1/batch` ($0.01) — Batch up to 5 utility calls in one request. Saves gas vs individual x402 payments.

### Micro Tier ($0.10 - $0.50 USDC)
- `GET /v1/markets/feed` ($0.10) — Last 10 regulatory events matched to prediction markets.
- `POST /v1/markets/events` ($0.50) — Classified regulatory events by agency and market impact.

### Standard Tier ($1.00 - $5.00 USDC)
- `POST /v1/regulatory/scan` ($2.00) — Full regulatory risk scan with scored impact assessment.
- `POST /v1/regulatory/changes` ($1.00) — Recent regulatory changes classified by agency.
- `POST /v1/regulatory/jurisdiction` ($3.00) — Jurisdiction comparison with compliance costs.
- `POST /v1/regulatory/query` ($1.00) — Regulatory Q&A with statutory citations.
- `POST /v1/markets/signal/{market_id}` ($2.00) — Scored signal for one prediction market.
- `POST /v1/markets/signals` ($5.00) — Bulk scored signals for all regulatory markets.
- `POST /v1/fed/signal` ($5.00) — Pre-FOMC signal with Kalshi KXFED-calibrated rate probabilities.
- `POST /v1/oracle/uma` ($5.00) — UMA Optimistic Oracle assertion data.
- `POST /v1/oracle/chainlink` ($5.00) — Chainlink External Adapter response.

### Premium Tier ($10.00 - $50.00 USDC)
- `POST /v1/markets/alpha` ($10.00) — Alpha report with edge analysis, Kelly sizing, trade verdict.
- `POST /v1/markets/resolution` ($25.00) — Resolution verdict for prediction market settlement.
- `POST /v1/fed/decision` ($25.00) — Real-time FOMC decision classification within 30 seconds.
- `POST /v1/fed/resolution` ($50.00) — FOMC resolution verdict with full evidence chain for oracle submission.

## Payment Methods

Three ways to pay for HYDRA endpoints:

1. **x402 Protocol** (recommended) — Use any x402-compatible client. The server returns HTTP 402 with payment instructions. Send USDC on Base (chain 8453) to `0x2F12A73e1e08F3BCE12212005cCaBE2ACEf87141`. The x402 facilitator at `https://x402.org/facilitator` handles verification.
2. **Direct Payment Proof** — Send USDC manually, then include the transaction hash in the `X-Payment-Proof` header.
3. **MPP (Machine Payments Protocol)** — Session-based micropayments via Stripe/Tempo. Include `Authorization: Payment <credential>` header.

## Agent Use Cases

- **x402 ecosystem navigation**: Discover all x402 services, check their health, get routed to the best one
- **Composite intelligence**: Get a single alpha signal combining regulatory + Fed + prediction market data (unique to HYDRA)
- **Regulatory risk scoring**: Instant 0-100 risk score for any token or DeFi protocol
- **Push alert subscriptions**: Set-and-forget webhook alerts for regulatory events matching your keywords
- **Web extraction**: Get clean structured text, metadata, and links from any URL
- **Format conversion**: Convert HTML to Markdown, JSON to CSV, CSV to JSON
- **Developer tools**: Hash text, encode/decode Base64/URL/hex, diff texts, validate JSON/email
- **Web infrastructure**: Check URL health, DNS records, SSL certificates, HTTP headers
- **Research**: Search Wikipedia, arXiv papers, SEC EDGAR filings
- **Prediction market trading**: Scored regulatory signals with Kalshi KXFED market-calibrated probabilities
- **FOMC event trading**: Pre-decision signals with live KXFED-calibrated rate probabilities, real-time classification within 30 seconds
- **Economic data**: Atomic real-time snapshot from FRED (28 series), BLS, Treasury, FDIC — all Tier 1 government sources
- **Bank failure monitoring**: FDIC BankFind API for bank closure tracking and financial stability analysis
- **Compliance monitoring**: Scan DeFi protocols against SEC, CFTC, FinCEN frameworks
- **Oracle resolution**: Generate UMA/Chainlink oracle assertions with evidence chains
- **Utility tooling**: Crypto prices, gas estimates, RSS parsing, web scraping

## Quick Test

```bash
# 1. Check health (free)
curl -s https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/health | python3 -m json.tool

# 2. Browse prediction markets (free)
curl -s https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/v1/markets | python3 -m json.tool

# 3. View all pricing (free)
curl -s https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/pricing | python3 -m json.tool

# 4. Trigger a 402 challenge (no payment — see payment instructions in response)
curl -s https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/v1/util/crypto/price?token=ETH
```

## Integration

- **MCP Server**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/mcp` (Model Context Protocol, streamable HTTP)
- **OpenAPI**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/openapi.json`
- **x402 Manifest**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/.well-known/x402.json`
- **A2A Agent Card**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/.well-known/agent-card.json` (Google A2A v0.3)
- **AI Plugin**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/.well-known/ai-plugin.json`
- **MCP Manifest**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/.well-known/mcp.json`
- **Agents JSON**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/.well-known/agents.json`
- **LLMs.txt**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/.well-known/llms.txt`
- **Interactive Docs**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/docs`
- **Sitemap**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/sitemap.xml`
- **GitHub**: `https://github.com/OGCryptoKitty/hydra-arm3`

## MCP Client Setup

```bash
# Claude Code
claude mcp add --transport http hydra https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/mcp

# Claude Desktop — add to claude_desktop_config.json:
# { "mcpServers": { "hydra": { "url": "https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/mcp" } } }

# .mcp.json (project-scoped)
# { "hydra": { "type": "http", "url": "https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/mcp" } }
```
